campaign: membrane strict/hardened overhead + validation-pipeline + allocator + string kernels

build.profile: bench (inherits release: opt-level=3, lto=true→thin, codegen-units=1) ; release-perf available (debug=line-tables-only, strip=false)

execution.runner: rch remote workers (Contabo VPS fleet); each rch job isolated to one worker + per-job target dir
execution.isolation_note: shared multi-tenant VPS: ns-scale microbench tails are noise-prone (noisy-neighbor); RANKING and median deltas are robust, absolute p95/p99 tails are conservative/inflated
execution.orchestrator_host: local 64-core, kernel 6.17.0-29-generic, perf_event_paranoid=4 (perf/samply unavailable without sysctl; not used — measurement via rch-resident criterion + custom ns/op harness)
